DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Curiale Wilson (415-835-6777) of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Plaintiff/ opposing party Paul Madonna.
Daniel E. Dersham (415-426-7111) of Willey & Bentaleb for Defendant/Moving party ALICE MCLEISH, DONALD MCLEISH, BOCK LOO, and FAYE WONG.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALICE MCLEISH, DONALD MCLEISH, BOCK LOO, and FAYE WONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. The action was brought within the statute of limitations. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Allegations In Plaintiffs Fac
